title: pelargonium × codringtonii
intro: Pelargonium × codringtonii, also known as Mountain Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × codringtonii include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating cold and flu symptoms. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
